title: 葵ステークスにむけて

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is my moment, the race that will help me
grow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll win without breaking a sweat, refining myself
even further!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And I'll do it all with the power of speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've learned a new phrase recently... let me teach
you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
"Like a bolt from the blue!" It basically means
something surprising happens!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It resonated with me! I'll be there to astound them
all! Be prepared for some lightning-fast speed!
